purpose_digest: 여러 프로젝트에서 공통으로 사용할 수 있는 표준 AI 협업 워크플로우를 *독립 패키지 형태* 로 제공

recent_done_items: TASK-2026-07-17-005 — v0.15.5 — **SemVer patch, Panel 4 cross-validation smoke — v0.15.x follow-up 의 cross-check discipline anchor**. Panel 4 (smoke_trend) 의 두 metric cross-validation. Panel 4 의미: (1) `cumulative_total` / `cumulative_pass` = 가장 최근 release note 의 누적 smoke (v0.15.0 = 260) + (2) `smoke_files_count` = `workflow-source/tests/check_*.py` 의 file 갯수 (실제 data 기반, v0.15.5 시점 183) + (3) `cumulative_pass_rate` = pass / total (현 시점 1.0) + (4) `recent_releases` = [version, pass, total] × 5 (newest first). 두 metric 의 의미가 다름 (case 누적 vs file 갯수) — 한 file 에 여러 case 가능, 1:1 매칭 안 됨. **5 case cross-check (smoke `check_smoke_trend_cross_v0_15_5.py` 5/5 PASS)**: (1) **case_1 sanity** — `cumulative_total > 0` + `smoke_files_count > 0` + `cumulative_pass <= total` + `0.0 <= rate <= 1.0` (4 field 정합). (2) **case_2 ratio sanity** — `cumulative_total >= smoke_files_count` (case >= file 가정 정합; 현 시점 260/183 = 1.42 ratio). (3) **case_3 recent_releases consistency** — `recent[0].pass/total == panel top cumulative` (most recent release note 의 누적 = panel top). (4) **case_4 delta vs v0.15.0 baseline** — `smoke_files_count >= 179 + 신규 smoke count` (v0.15.0 baseline 179 + v0.15.2/3/4 신규 3 = expected_min 182; v0.15.5 시점 183 = 182 + 1). panel `smoke_files_count` == 실제 file count (file-based, real-time). (5) **case_5 pass_rate full** — `cumulative_pass_rate == 1.0` + `cumulative_pass == cumulative_total` (full pass 정합). **ratio 관측**: v0.15.5 시점 1.42 ratio — 한 file 당 평균 1.42 case. **discipline anchor**: 매 release 시 panel 4 의 두 metric sanity + cross-check 자동 검증. **cyclical discipline** — 매 major release 시 smoke `check_smoke_trend_cross_v0_15_5.py` 회귀 검증. **검증** (모두 PASS, 회귀 ❌): check_smoke_trend_cross_v0_15_5 5/5 (신규) + check_deprecation_3rd_cycle_v0_15_4 3/3 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_3 3/3 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_2 4/4 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_14_6 4/4 + check_quality_dashboard_v0_13_0 12/12 + check_drift_prevention 6/6 + check_phase15_dashboard_panels 4/4 + check_appendonly_memory_layout 6/6 + check_memory_lint 4/4 + check_audit_mkdocs_links 5/5 = **11 smoke 모두 PASS**. **산출물**: 3 file (1 신규 smoke + 1 maturity_matrix 갱신 + 1 dashboard regen). breaking change: ❌.

TASK-2026-07-17-004 — v0.15.4 — **SemVer patch, ADR-007 close-out — 3rd deprecation cycle accepted no-op**. ADR-007 placeholder 종결. v0.11.24 (placeholder 작성) + v0.15.4 (close-out) 의 *2 차례 codebase re-scan* 결과, 3rd deprecation cycle 영향 symbol *의도적 부재* 확인. **v0.15.4+ re-scan 정공법 (smoke `check_deprecation_3rd_cycle_v0_15_4.py` 3/3 PASS)**: (1) case_1 — `warnings.warn(..., DeprecationWarning)` emit call site 가 `workflow_kit/common/decorators.py:v0_7_4_deprecated` decorator 본체 안에서만 2건 (infrastructure only). 다른 module 에서는 *직접* emit 0건. (2) case_2 — `__deprecated__ = True` marker 설정 2건 모두 `workflow_kit/common/decorators.py` 안 (decorator 본체) — 다른 module 0건. (3) case_3 — `@v0_7_4_deprecated` decorator 의 *실제 apply* 0건 (docstring usage example 제외). **infrastructure vs surface 분리**: v0.7.4+ 의 `v0_7_4_deprecated` decorator 는 *infrastructure* 로만 존재 (apply 0건). 즉, deprecation *정책* (decorator 정의) 과 *정책 적용 surface* (mark 된 symbol) 가 분리된 상태. **ADR-007 갱신** (`docs/architecture/ADR-007-deprecation-3rd-cycle-candidates.md`): status `draft (placeholder)` → **`accepted (no-op)`** (v0.15.4 close-out) + Date 2026-07-03 (initial), 2026-07-17 (v0.15.4 close-out) + 본문 §3rd cycle 후보 식별 필요성 v0.15.4 re-scan 결과로 갱신 + §Decision `accepted (no-op)` 종결 + §Consequences 갱신 (positive: close-out 의 verifiable anchor, negative: infrastructure vs surface 분리) + §후속 작업 close-out 상태로 갱신. **v1.0.0 진입 평가 anchor** — v1.0.0 milestone 진입 시 status `accepted (no-op)` → `reopened` 가능성 검토 (legacy symbol audit 결과에 따라). **cyclical discipline** — 매 major release 시 smoke `check_deprecation_3rd_cycle_v0_15_4.py` 회귀 검증 (deprecation policy 의 discipline anchor). **검증** (모두 PASS, 회귀 ❌): check_deprecation_3rd_cycle_v0_15_4 3/3 (신규) + check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_3 3/3 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_2 4/4 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_14_6 4/4 + check_quality_dashboard_v0_13_0 12/12 + check_drift_prevention 6/6 + check_phase15_dashboard_panels 4/4 + check_appendonly_memory_layout 6/6 + check_memory_lint 4/4 + check_audit_mkdocs_links 5/5 = **10 smoke 모두 PASS**. **산출물**: 3 file (1 ADR-007 갱신 + 1 신규 smoke + 1 maturity_matrix 갱신). breaking change: ❌.

TASK-2026-07-17-003 — v0.15.3 — **SemVer patch, v0.14.6 out-of-scope 2 해소 — release_error 시에만 maturity refresh**. maturity_matrix v0.14.6 description 의 "Out of scope v0.15.0" 2건 중 2건 close. **step 6.7 default 동작 flip**: release_error (`results["error"]` 존재) 시에만 `cmd_refresh_maturity(args)` 호출. release 성공 시 skip. rationale: release 성공 후 (operator 가 이미 gh release create 성공 확인) maturity 자체가 today 면 no-op 인 호출이 dashboard freshness 와 무관 — release_error (gh release create fail) 상황 에서만 operator 가 retry 할 수 있도록 panel 1 freshness 보강. release_error fallback 정공법. **(1) `cmd_release` step 6.7 의 `if release_error and ...:` guard 추가** (`workflow-source/tools/release_pipeline.py`) + `elif not release_error:` branch 에 `skipped_due_to_release_success: True` field emit (debugging 용). (2) `--no-legacy-memory` strict opt-out (v0.15.2) 와 호환: release_error 이면서 strict opt-out 면 strict skip 우선 (둘 다 적용). (3) **신규 smoke `tests/check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_3.py` 3/3 PASS**: case_1 release 성공 시 skip (skipped_due_to_release_success=True + refreshed field 부재) + case_2 release_error 시 호출 (refreshed: bool + before/after 정합 + 실제 file 미변경) + case_3 release_error + --no-legacy-memory (legacy_memory_strict_opt_out=True + skip_reason + refreshed=False). **v0.14.6 out-of-scope 2/2 close**. **검증** (모두 PASS, 회귀 ❌): check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_3 3/3 (신규) + check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_2 4/4 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_14_6 4/4 + check_quality_dashboard_v0_13_0 12/12 + check_drift_prevention 6/6 + check_phase15_dashboard_panels 4/4 + check_appendonly_memory_layout 6/6 + check_memory_lint 4/4 = **8 smoke 모두 PASS**. **산출물**: 3 file (1 release_pipeline step 6.7 guard + 1 smoke + 1 maturity_matrix 갱신). breaking change: ❌.

TASK-2026-07-17-002 — v0.15.2 — **SemVer patch, v0.14.6 out-of-scope 1 해소 — legacy_memory strict opt-out 정렬**. maturity_matrix v0.14.6 의 "Out of scope v0.15.0" 2건 중 1건 close. (1) `cmd_refresh_maturity` 에 `--legacy-memory` / `--no-legacy-memory` flag 추가 (`workflow-source/tools/release_pipeline.py` `argparse.BooleanOptionalAction`): `--no-legacy-memory` strict opt-out 면 silent fallback 비활성 caller 로 간주, maturity refresh 자체 skip + `legacy_memory_strict_opt_out: True` + `skip_reason` field emit. (2) `cmd_release` 의 `p_rel` argparse 에 동일 flag 추가 (release level flag): step 6.7 의 `cmd_refresh_maturity(args)` 호출 시 `args.legacy_memory == False` 면 skip message emit (`[maturity] skip (--no-legacy-memory strict opt-out — v0.15.0+ ⚠️ BREAKING caller 정합)`). **v0.15.0 ⚠️ BREAKING 정합** — cache.py 의 silent fallback 자체가 disable 된 caller 가 maturity refresh 도 안 하는 정합법. (3) 신규 smoke `tests/check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_2.py` 4/4 PASS: case_1 `--no-legacy-memory` strict opt-out (refreshed=False + skip_reason + 실제 file 미변경) + case_2 `--legacy-memory=True` (정공법 진행 + 정상 갱신) + case_3 default None (정공법 진행 + mode=apply) + case_4 step 6.7 skip message (`[maturity] skip (--no-legacy-memory strict opt-out ...)`). **Out of scope 2** (release_error 시에만 maturity 호출) 은 별도 release candidate. **검증** (모두 PASS, 회귀 ❌): check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_2 4/4 (신규) + check_refresh_maturity_v0_14_6 4/4 (기존 회귀 ❌) + check_quality_dashboard_v0_13_0 12/12 + check_drift_prevention 6/6 + check_phase15_dashboard_panels 4/4 + check_appendonly_memory_layout 6/6 + check_memory_lint 4/4 = **7 smoke 모두 PASS**. **산출물**: 3 file (1 release_pipeline parser+gate + 1 smoke + 1 maturity_matrix 갱신). breaking change: ❌.

TASK-2026-07-17-001 — v0.15.1 — **SemVer patch, dashboard 정합 + Panel 4 SMOKE_COUNT_PATTERN 확장**. v0.15.0 ⚠️ BREAKING push 후 발견된 dashboard 회귀 close-out. **3 deliverable**: (1) **SMOKE_COUNT_PATTERN regex 확장** (`workflow_kit/common/dashboard_data.py`) — 기존 `누적 smoke test **N/N PASS**` 단일 매치 → `누적 ... smoke ... **N/N PASS**` + `누적 ... smoke ... **N+ PASS**` 두 형식 모두 매치 + forward-compat alias. `_parse_smoke_count_from_release` 가 N+ 표기 시 `(N, N)` 으로 정규화 (pass=total 가정, release note 가 이미 100% pass 단언). (2) **Beta-v0.15.0.md 표기 정정** — `**누적 smoke 260+ PASS.**` → `- 누적 smoke **260+ PASS** (회귀 ❌)` (v0.14.1~v0.14.7 시리즈와 동일 형식). (3) **신규 smoke case 2개 + 5/8 panel 정합** (`tests/check_quality_dashboard_v0_13_0.py` 10/10 → 12/12) — case 11: N+ 표기 parse (260+ → (260, 260), 41/41 → (41, 41), no-match → None) + case 12: Panel 4 N+ fixture (300+ → (300, 300)) + `_check_snapshot_shape` / `_check_cli_markdown` / `_check_html_render` / `_check_cli_html` 모두 5 panel → 8 panel 정합 (Panel 6/7/8 추가, latent 회귀 해소). **Panel 정합 (v0.15.1 dashboard regen)**: Panel 1 maturity_last_updated=2026-07-17 + head_commit_date=2026-07-17 + delta_days=0 / Panel 4 cumulative_total=260 + cumulative_pass=260 + rate=1.0 + Recent release smoke counts v0.15.0 (260/260) 최상위 정렬 / Panel 5 11 items + TASK-2026-07-16-001 v0.15.0 최상단 / Panel 7 stage=v0.15.0 current + next_release=(complete) + 4-row timeline / Panel 8 telemetry_hit_rate=1.0. **검증** (모두 PASS, 회귀 ❌): check_quality_dashboard_v0_13_0 12/12 (10→12 확장) + check_drift_prevention 6/6 + check_phase15_dashboard_panels 4/4 + check_appendonly_memory_layout 6/6 + check_memory_lint 4/4 + check_audit_mkdocs_links 5/5 = **6 smoke 모두 PASS**. **산출물**: 5 file (1 dashboard_data parser + 1 smoke + 1 release note 정정 + 2 snapshot regen). breaking change: ❌.

TASK-2026-07-16-001 — v0.15.0 — **⚠️ SemVer minor, BREAKING — 2nd deprecation cycle 종결 (work_backlog.md.bak drop) + push prep + audit fix** (3 commit, `d7109ef` + `b31beb2` + `57a00dc`). pre-v0.15.0 caller 중 `--legacy-memory` 명시 없이 `.bak` silent fallback 사용하던 caller 는 v0.15.0 부터 자동 fallback 불가. ADR-003 deprecation cycle **complete**: v0.14.0 (1st 시작) → v0.14.1 (1st 종결) → v0.14.5 (2nd 시작) → **v0.15.0 (2nd 종결)**. **A. `work_backlog.md.bak` 완전 drop**: 5.7MB / 58389 bytes / 330 line git rm. **B. 자동 정합**: cache.py 분기 코드 변경 ❌ (docstring만 갱신). **C. maturity_matrix**: deprecation_cycle_stage 'v0.14.5' → **'v0.15.0'**. **D. Panel 7 dashboard 자동 정합**: collect_deprecation_cycle_progress가 `bak + legacy` 모두 부재 detect → `stage: v0.15.0` (complete). **E. snapshot regen**: Panel 7 stage=v0.15.0 + declared_stage=v0.15.0 + bak_present=False + legacy_present=False + next_release=(complete) + timeline 4 row + current marker at v0.15.0. **F. cache.py docstring 갱신**: deprecation_warnings block 정합. **G. push prep (`b31beb2`)**: README header sync + drift G2 fix + panel 7 stage branch. **H. push prep 중 발견된 회귀 fix (`57a00dc`)**: audit_mkdocs_links.py _strip_code_blocks 의 out.append(cleaned) 누락 → non-code/non-fence line drop 회귀 해결. check_audit_mkdocs_links 4/5 → 5/5 PASS + 실제 docs/ audit 39 links / 0 broken. **Migration 가이드**: (1) legacy_memory=True 또는 --legacy-memory 명시, (2) explicit session_handoff_path / work_backlog_index_path 명시, (3) .bak 미존재 정공법 (v0.15.0+ 권장). **검증 (10 smoke 모두 PASS, 회귀 ❌)**: drift prevention 6/6 + memory_lint 4/4 + memory_freeze_lint + **appendonly_memory_layout 6/6 + WARN 0** (`.bak` drop 후 WARNINGS 빈 list) + git_history_summarizer 5/5 + smart_context_reader 5/5 + apply_robust_patch 5/5 + **phase15_dashboard_panels 4/4** + deprecation_cycle_v0_14_5 4/4 + refresh_maturity_v0_14_6 4/4. **누적 smoke 260+ PASS**. **산출물**: 16 file (1 bak drop + 8 release notes Beta-v0.14.1~v0.15.0 + 1 release note v0.15.0 backlog + 1 README sync + 2 dashboard snapshot regen + 1 maturity_matrix + 1 pyproject + 1 __init__.py + 1 cache.py docstring + 1 audit fix). breaking change: ✅ SemVer minor (BREAKING).

GitHub Release `v0.11.21-beta` tag push + gh release create exit 0 (https://github.com/ykylee/standard_ai_workflow/releases/tag/v0.11.21-beta). PyPI 배포: no. breaking change: ❌.

TASK-2026-07-09-001 — v0.13.3 — **SemVer patch, Phase 13 AC4+ (self-documenting wiki ↔ memory bidirectional link) close-out**. Phase 13 의 마지막 acceptance close (AC1+AC2+AC3+AC4+ 모두 ✅). **3 deliverable**: (1) `workflow_kit/common/state/bidir_link.py` 신규 (260 line, R-A sync + R-C audit 통합) — `normalize_memory_path_to_wiki_relative` (in-repo 절대 path ↔ wiki relative 변환) + `audit_bidirectional_links` (wiki pages × memory entries cross-reference 검증, `BidirLinkAudit` emit) + `sync_memory_to_wiki` (memory entry mentioned_in → wiki frontmatter related_pages 자동 추가, idempotent, `BidirSyncResult` emit) + `BidirLinkAsymmetry` (방향별 비대칭); (2) `cmd_bidir_link` dispatcher subcommand 38 (R-A sync + R-C audit 1-cycle, pre-audit → sync → post-audit) — `--apply`/`--json` flag, default = audit only (read-only); (3) `cmd_release` step 2.8 — sync-maturity-matrix 후 bidir-link audit 자동 호출 (advisory only, release 차단 ❌, `--skip-bidir-link` escape hatch) + release note 본문에 `## Bidirectional link audit` 섹션 자동 append (idempotent marker, v0.13.2 self-recovery log 와 동일 정공법). **신규 smoke**: `check_bidir_link_v0_13_3.py` 6/6 PASS (audit shape / path normalization / dry-run no modify / sync apply + symmetric / re-audit symmetric / format markdown). **housekeeping**: samples 24 file tool_version v0.13.2-beta → v0.13.3-beta + schemas regen + dashboard regen + pyproject 0.13.3 + __init__.py fallback v0.13.3-beta + README header sync + maturity_matrix v0.13.3 1줄. **검증**: drift prevention 6/6 PASS + mypy strict 0 new error (21→21 errors) + 3 skill smoke 3/3 + memory_index 25/25 + telemetry 6/6 + self-recover 8/8 + dashboard 10/10 + output samples/schema 3/3. **누적 smoke 225+ PASS**. **산출물**: 3 신규 (bidir_link.py + smoke + release note) + 8 수정 + 2 housekeeping. **AC4+ close**: phase-13-definition-north-star.md AC4+ status 🟡 → ✅. breaking change: ❌.

TASK-2026-07-09-002 — v0.13.2 — **SemVer patch, Phase 13 AC3 (self-recovering) close-out**. drift prevention 의 6 case 가 검출한 drift 를 자동 fix + manual_required 분리 + release note self-recovery log 자동 emit 의 1-cycle orchestrator. **3 deliverable**: (1) Self-recover orchestrator — `cmd_self_recover` dispatcher subcommand 37 (`--apply` / `--dry-run` / `--json`) + detect (`_run_drift_prevention_smoke` subprocess) + classify (`_classify_drift_failures` + `_SELF_RECOVER_CASE_MAP` dict 5 auto / 2 manual) + fix (5 fix callable: `_fix_loud_fallback` / `_fix_readme_header_version` / `_fix_maturity_matrix_drift` × 2 case) + re-check (6/6 PASS) + emit (`_emit_recovery_summary` dict);
